metadata.title: Pulling Off a Smooth 2v2 Site Retake with Smart Positioning in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Check out this quick 2v2 site retake where positioning and timing make all the difference. Watch how steady aim and calm moves turn the fight around. What’s your favorite spot to clutch on?

Got a clutch like this? Share your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
